basic_details.job_title: RailTel Medical Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: RailTel Corporation of India (RailTel) Medical Consultant Notification 2026 has been released on 25 April 2026 on the official website www.railtelindia.com . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the RailTel Medical Consultant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 27 years Maximum Age: 50 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.details: Medical Consultant: MBBS / BDS from a recognized university/institution (05 years full-time course). Minimum 05 years total experience. At least 02 years relevant experience in handling medical devices, emergency healthcare systems, or similar projects (preferably related to BHISHM Cube or equivalent systems). Experience should be in Central Govt. Org. / State Govt. Org. / PSU / Defense / Pvt. Org.

salary_details.details: Monthly CTC ₹ 1,14,008/- (inclusive of gratuity and medical benefits)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for RailTel Medical Consultant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.railtelindia.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RailTel Medical Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the RailTel Medical Consultant position is 16-05-2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Consultant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS/BDS degree from a recognized university or institution, with a minimum of 5 years of total experience and at least 2 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Medical Consultant position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Medical Consultant post is between 27 years (minimum) and 50 years (maximum). Age relaxation may be applicable as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Medical Consultant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly CTC of Rs. ₹ 1,14,008/-, which includes gratuity and medical benefits.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Medical Consultant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Medical Consultant position in RailTel Corporation of India.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Medical Consultant post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an interview followed by a medical examination.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a contractual position.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of RailTel Corporation of India, which is www.railtelindia.com.
